THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ORIGINAL BUFFALO WINGS CORPORATION RECOVER FROM APPELLANT WIN WIN TRADING CORPORATION $3,140.10 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,515.10, AFFIRMED & REVERSED IN PART. GUO WEI ZHU IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE PRINCIPAL REFLECTS AMOUNTS ALLEGED TO BE OWED UNDER THE JUNE 30, 2019 STATEMENT AS ADJUSTED BY PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Appellant/Defendant Win Win Trading Corporation et al. is present in pro per.
The company representative, Guo Wei Zhu, is being assisted by certified Cantonese interpreter Rebecca Chau.

Respondent/Plaintiff Original Buffalo Wings Corporation et al. is present in pro per.
The company representative is Sandra Ung is being assisted by her daughter, Melanie Tan.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Guo Wei Zhu testifies on his behalf and Win Win Trading Corporation.
Exhibit introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Financial statements 9 pages dated June 30, 2019.

Sandra Ung testifies on her behalf and the Original Buffalo Wings Corporation.

Exhibits introduced:
Exhibit A - Copy of returned check dated February 18, 2017.
Exhibit B - Multiple pages of financial statements.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk Sylvia Java, Not reported.(525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Continued To Oct-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Continued To Jun-10-19 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
